subject: npmx Weekly #14
headline: npmx Weekly #14
intro: Explore the latest milestones and updates shaping the npmx landscape. Discover significant advancements in package management and user engagement.

topics.title: pnpm Version Update
topics.summary: pnpm v11.0.0 has been released, bringing continued improvements in package management. Users should update to the latest version using 'pnpm self-update latest-11'.

topics.title: npmx Growth Recognition
topics.summary: npmx has been recognized as the #7 fastest-growing open-source project of 2026, and #2 among non-AI-focused initiatives, underscoring its rising prominence in the community.

topics.title: Internationalization Updates
topics.summary: The introduction of the European Portuguese locale enhances npmx's accessibility, featuring a new JSON file for translations, thus broadening its global reach.
